Package
Description
com.github.copilot.sdk
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.sdk.generated.rpc
 
  • Classes in com.github.copilot.sdk.generated.rpc used by com.github.copilot.sdk
    Class
    Description
    ServerRpc
    Typed client for server-level RPC methods.
    SessionRpc
    Typed client for session-scoped RPC methods.
